PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?mission ?missionLabel WHERE {
  ?mission wdt:P31 wd:Q4847366 .
  ?mission rdfs:label ?missionLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?missionLabel) = "en")
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?missionLabel) , "exoplanet"))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?missionLabel) , "search") || CONTAINS(LCASE(?missionLabel) , "survey"))
}
